description: Organized crime syndicate founded and controlled by Dawood Ibrahim, based in India. Established in the 1970s by Shabir Ibrahim Kaskar and Dawood Ibrahim. Involved in drug trafficking, extortion, murder, and terrorism, including the 1993 Bombay bombings and logistics for the 2008 Mumbai attacks. Designated as a Global Terrorist Organization by the U.S. Treasury.

country_links.evidence_quote: with addresses in India, Pakistan and the United Arab Emirates.
country_links.context: D-Company has addresses in Pakistan and operates there.
